summary: Marketing Content Calendar List View and Post Detail Page - All features tested and working. Backend: 20/20 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All UI elements verified - List View with filters, Post Detail page with edit/workflow/delete functionality.
seed_data_creation: 6 posts exist in April 2026 for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Marketing List View and Post Detail Page fully implemented and tested. List View at /marketing-calendar with view toggle (Month/Week/Day/List). List view shows table with Date, Concept, Category, Type, Platforms, Status columns. Filters: month dropdown, year dropdown, status dropdown, category dropdown. Clicking row navigates to /marketing-post/:postId. Post Detail page shows concept, message, platform links, workflow status buttons, metadata. Edit mode enables inline editing. Workflow buttons change status via API. Back button returns to calendar. Design: corporate minimalist with white backgrounds, 1px borders, blue-600 accents.

Backend_API_Tests.GET_posts_post_id: PASSED - Returns single post with all fields
Backend_API_Tests.GET_calendar_posts_by_date: PASSED - Returns posts grouped by date
Backend_API_Tests.GET_calendar_stats: PASSED - Returns stats with by_status, by_category, by_content_type
Backend_API_Tests.GET_calendar_events: PASSED - Returns events for the month
Backend_API_Tests.POST_detail_has_platforms: PASSED - Post detail includes platforms array
Backend_API_Tests.POST_detail_has_metadata: PASSED - Post detail includes date, category, content_type, created_at

Frontend_UI_Tests.List_view_activates: PASSED - Clicking List button shows list view
Frontend_UI_Tests.List_filters_present: PASSED - Month, Year, Status, Category dropdowns found
Frontend_UI_Tests.List_table_present: PASSED - Table with Date, Concept, Category, Type, Platforms, Status columns
Frontend_UI_Tests.Post_Detail_edit_button: PASSED - Enables edit mode with Save/Cancel buttons
Frontend_UI_Tests.Post_Detail_edit_fields: PASSED - Concept, Message, Date, Category, Content Type editable
Frontend_UI_Tests.Post_Detail_workflow_buttons: PASSED - 4 workflow buttons (Draft, Review, Scheduled, Published)
Frontend_UI_Tests.Post_Detail_status_change: PASSED - Clicking workflow button changes status via API
Frontend_UI_Tests.Month_filter_works: PASSED - Changing month reloads posts for that month
Frontend_UI_Tests.Status_filter_works: PASSED - Filtering by status shows only matching posts
Frontend_UI_Tests.Category_filter_works: PASSED - Filtering by category shows only matching posts

Design_Verification.Blue_accents: PASSED - New Post button uses rgb(37, 99, 235) (blue-600)
Design_Verification.Thin_borders: PASSED - 1px borders on table and cards
Design_Verification.Corporate_minimalist: PASSED - Clean layout with proper spacing
